title: role_ids serialization duplicated in space_set_update
description: The pattern of serializing an optional &[&str] slice to a JSON Array appears twice in space_set_update: once for SpaceAddMemberInput.role_ids and once for SpaceUpdateMemberInput.role_ids. This is ~6 lines of identical code duplicated. A private helper fn role_ids_to_json(ids: &[&str]) -> serde_json::Value would eliminate the duplication and make it easier to spot if the logic ever needs to change (e.g. if role IDs get a typed wrapper). Suggested rewrite: fn role_ids_to_json(ids: &[&str]) -> serde_json::Value { Value::Array(ids.iter().map(|id| Value::String((*id).to_owned())).collect()) }
close_reason: role_ids helper not worth adding for 2 occurrences; no material complexity reduction
